content: Autonomous curiosity mechanisms from ICM-driven curious agents can be framed as a built-in active learning selector for SOTA 2024-2025 agent memory systems, where intrinsic reward signals automatically prioritize which new experiences get stored in long-term compressed memory instead of relying on manual or heuristic sampling rules. This creates a self-tuning memory pipeline that grows only the most surprising, high-value knowledge as the agent explores an environment.
